THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINGDOM OF SWEDEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMART, ANDREW JOHN THE SUM OF 261,562 IS TO BE PAID IN SWEDISH CROWNS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-02-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $15.00
